description: Template for the internal structure of a flow modal. Each flow modal follows this exact 10-section pattern extracted from the golden reference HTML.

sections._hint: 2-3 sentences explaining the pain point this flow solves. Start with 'Cuando...' / 'When...' describing the trigger situation.
Each step has a time range (e.g., '0-5 min') and a concrete instruction. Steps should be sequential and additive. Last step should always involve publishing/sharing.

sections.textEn: What you get at the end

sections._hint: 1-2 sentences describing the concrete artifact produced. Be specific: name the artifact type, its format, and its immediate use.

sections.titleEs: Como sabes que lo hiciste bien
sections.titleEn: How you know you did it right
sections._hint: Definition of Done. 2-3 verifiable criteria. At least one should involve a third party (stakeholder, colleague) being able to use/understand the output.

sections.textEs: Cuando vas a notar la diferencia

sections._hint: Three-phase progression: initial clumsy execution, competent execution, automatic mastery. Use bold for week labels. Show time reduction and quality improvement.

_composerNotes: This template defines the STRUCTURE of every flow modal. Fields marked _generate:true need LLM generation per flow. The compose-manifest script uses this template to validate that every flow modal has all 10 sections. The golden reference has this exact pattern for all 13 flow modals.
